input.name: The Rhythm Makers Live at The Anchor
input.brief: The Rhythm Makers bring their energetic mix of funk, soul, and blues to The Anchor. The four-piece band features guitar, bass, drums, and saxophone. Known for getting the crowd on their feet with classic covers and original tracks.

notes: Fully specified event — the pipeline should produce publishable content on first generation or after deterministic repair
